title: DJ VANTA bounded dry-run set timeline
purpose: Give the private demo operator 10/20/45 minute set arcs without starting providers, recording, or publishing.
operator_rule: Review timeline as a run-of-show only; human approval is still required before live providers, GPU jobs, recording, uploads, or public streams.

segments.talk_text: This is DJ VANTA. Segment 1 is locked at 128 BPM. Energy 5. Stay hydrated and ride the next signal.
segments.visual_scene: warmup neon plasma tunnel with waveform gates and neon crowd ghosts
segments.transition_summary: Warmup Signal 01: 128->128 BPM, 16-bar blend, bass swap on bar 17, VJ intensity 5, crowd warming.

notes: Keep master clock stable for the localhost demo.
If tempo drift exceeds 4%, prefer phrase cut or energy reset instead of forced warp.

crossfader.formula: gainA = cos((value + 1) / 2 * PI / 2); gainB = sin((value + 1) / 2 * PI / 2)

automation.note: bar 1: Deck A full, Deck B preview/cued silently
bar 9: Deck B texture rises under Deck A
bar 17: equal-power midpoint for bass swap
bar 25: Deck B leads while Deck A tails
bar 33: Deck B full, Deck A released

notes: This is metadata only; no real continuous mixer is started.
Equal-power keeps perceived loudness steadier than linear fades during the handoff.

eq_moves.note: Introduce hats/texture over outgoing groove.
Open mids while confirming phrase alignment.
Bass swap: outgoing lows down, incoming lows to unity.
Release into drop; clear talk bed before impact.

input.prompt: readable neon typography, ASCII spectrograph star gate, DJ VANTA signal, words WAREHOUSE_WARMUP // LOW_FOG // HUMAN_OVERRIDE_READY, warmup energy 5, underground rave flyer grain, clear survival/culture text overlay, browser-first VJ cue
input.negative_prompt: illegible typography, watermark, extra logos, fake QR code, brand logos

warnings: ComfyUI /prompt is not called unless a human explicitly enables the backend.

comfyui_visual_spell.safety: dry-run visual-spell cue only; no Comfy Cloud, local GPU job, model download, or public publishing starts from this planner output
